initiatives.name: Really Really Free Market Albany
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through free markets and resource sharing in Albany. They coordinate direct assistance, free item distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for gift economy and collective care.

initiatives.name: Stop the Sweeps CV
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support for unhoused neighbors in the Corvallis area. They coordinate direct assistance, encampment support, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for housing justice and collective resistance.

initiatives.name: Really Really Free Market Corvallis
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through free markets and resource sharing in Corvallis. They coordinate direct assistance, free item distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for gift economy and collective care.

initiatives.name: Western WashCo for Racial Justice (WWRJ)
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through racial and economic justice organizing in Western Washington County. Originally started as SURJ Forest Grove, they now work as part of the Rural Organizing Project family of human dignity groups, coordinating political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through multiracial organizing and community building.

initiatives.name: Rogue Action Center
initiatives.description: Community organization building grassroots power through mutual aid networks, tenant organizing, and solidarity initiatives across Southern Oregon.

initiatives.name: NativeWomanShare
initiatives.description: Indigenous-led organization reuniting Takelma and Inter-Tribal Indigenous Mother Stewards & Two-Spirit communities through land stewardship, food sovereignty, and healing initiatives across the Pacific Northwest.

initiatives.name: Unite Oregon
initiatives.description: Led by people of color, immigrants and refugees, rural communities, and people experiencing poverty, building a unified intercultural movement for justice through community organizing, mutual aid, and leadership development.

initiatives.name: Cascades Abortion Support Collective
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective providing practical, emotional, and financial support to people seeking abortion care in Oregon and Southwest Washington.

initiatives.name: Center for Rural Livelihoods
initiatives.description: A non-profit organization focused on rural development and community supported forestry, offering workforce training, community garden spaces, and educational programs to support sustainable rural communities.

initiatives.name:
Clackamas County
                                Equity
                                Coalition
initiatives.description: A grassroots coalition fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through racial justice organizing in Clackamas County. They coordinate direct support, advocacy initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through community education, policy reform, and creating spaces for racial equity and systemic change.

initiatives.name: Respond to Racism
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through anti-racist organizing in Lake Oswego. They coordinate monthly community meetings, educational initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through community education, youth empowerment, and creating spaces for racial equity and systemic change in Lake Oswego and Oregon.

initiatives.name: Rural Organizing Project
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through rural organizing across Oregon. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through their network of autonomous human dignity groups, creating spaces for rural communities to work for democracy and human dignity.

initiatives.name: Black Oregon Land Trust
initiatives.description: A community land trust fostering mutual aid and land justice through Black land stewardship and ownership in Oregon. They coordinate land acquisition, agricultural programs, and solidarity networks while building power through Black food sovereignty, cultural preservation, and creating spaces for sustainable community development and intergenerational wealth building.

initiatives.name: Civil Liberties Defense Center
initiatives.description: A legal organization fostering mutual aid and movement support through legal advocacy and education across Oregon. They coordinate legal defense, know-your-rights trainings, and solidarity networks while building power through movement legal support, community education, and creating pathways for defending civil rights and civil liberties.

initiatives.name: Oregon Sex Workers Committee
initiatives.description: Addresses economic and health disparities among consensual adult sex workers and trafficking survivors in Oregon, centering BIPOC communities through research, advocacy, education, and harm reduction to promote safety and equity.

initiatives.name: Oregon Rural
initiatives.description: People organizing for the well-being of our communities and environment.
